name: Toba Batak

ancestors.notes: Northwest Sumatra–Barrier Islands / Batak branch of Malayo-Polynesian.

notes: Toba Batak (Hata Batak Toba), North Sumatra, Indonesia. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Wikidata records the indigenous Batak script (Surat Batak), an abugida with an inherent vowel; in practice Toba Batak is today written in the Latin alphabet, and a Latin-orthography map (not attempted here) would be the practical input contract. No grapheme map is claimed for either script.
